_comment: Style philosophy for the HYSA-DEFECTION frame ('why I left my bank / HYSA'). The highest-volume YT lane (262K median): the energy is calm-but-urgent, the proof is the payload (20-73% vs the genre's 4.3%), and the look leans documentary — fewer gimmicky zooms, captions only on the few lines that matter, a clean/cool grade. Inherits the global brand kit; only BIASES selection.
name: hysa-defection
